channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Automaker spying on drivers, reporting data to insurance companies
item.description: Since April, seven class action lawsuits have been filed against General Motors, OnStar, and data brokers LexisNexis and Verisk Analytics. The suits accuse GM of partnering with data brokers to collect driving data without proper consent using OnStar Smart Driver technology.
item.dc:creator: Mike Colombo, NewsNation

item.title: Is Outlook down? Thousands of Microsoft 365 users report outage issues
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Thousands of Microsoft 365 customers worldwide reported having issues with services like Outlook and Teams on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: EV range anxiety could be a thing of the past thanks to Mercedes’ new solar paint – which promises thousands of free miles a year
item.description: Mercedes-Benz reveals that it is working on solar paint that could add signifiant mileage to future EVs.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: How Scale became the go-to company for AI training
item.description: For the large language models (LLMs) that power apps like ChatGPT, Anthopic’s Claude, and Google’s Gemini to be good conversational partners and assistants, they need to be trained by humans with plenty of examples of appropriate answers.
item.dc:creator: Steven Melendez, Fast Company

item.title: California Considers Electric Vehicle Rebate Program Amid Federal Tax Credit Uncertainty
item.description: California Governor Gavin Newsom proposes rebates for electric vehicle purchases as federal tax credit looms uncertain under Trump administration
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Microsoft investigating outages affecting Outlook, Teams
item.description: An outage at Microsoft impacted thousands of online users on Monday as they attempted to use its Microsoft 365 service for emails, calendars and other features.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: The USC Rocket Lab: A Hub for Innovation and Community
item.description: The University of Southern California's (USC) Rocket Lab is a unique club that brings together students from various disciplines to design, build, and launch rockets into space.
item.dc:creator: Susan Karlin, Fast Company

item.title: Unlock Your Potential: Exploring Four Top Online Learning Platforms
item.description: Discover the best free online courses from Coursera, edX, FutureLearn, and Khan Academy
item.dc:creator: Doug Aamoth, Fast Company

item.title: Why data quality drives AI success
item.description: When it comes to AI, the secret to its success isn’t just in the sophistication of the algorithms — it’s in the quality of the data that powers them. AI has the potential to transform industries, but without reliable, relevant, and high-quality data, even the most advanced models will fall short.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Air Travel Revolution: IATA and Facephi's Digital Transformation Initiative
item.description: IATA and Facephi collaborate to bring 100% digital air travel experience with biometric identification and digital wallets
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: 3 data engineering trends riding Kafka, Flink, and Iceberg
item.description: Apache Kafka, Apache Flink, and Apache Iceberg are among the most popular technologies in the data ecosystem.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: AI bots could be a new tool to get people to be open about their feelings
item.description: As the legislative election in France approached this summer, a research team decided to reach out to hundreds of citizens to interview them about their views on key issues. But the interviewer asking the questions wasn’t a human researcher— it was an AI chatbot.
item.dc:creator: Jeffrey R. Young, Fast Company

item.title: Bitcoin ticks closer to $100,000 in extended surge following US elections
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Bitcoin extended its streak of record highs after ticking above $99,000 for the first time. The cryptocurrency has rocketed more than 40% in just two weeks.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Risk and Compliance Exchange 2024: DoD’ Stacy Bostjanick, DCMA’s Jennifer Henderson on finding ‘any means possible’ to help small biz with CMMC
item.description: As the Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification program inches closer to reality, DoD prepares defense industrial base for compliance requirements.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Supreme Court allows multibillion-dollar class action to proceed against Meta
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Supreme Court is allowing a multibillion-dollar class action investors’ lawsuit to proceed against Facebook parent Meta, stemming from the privacy scandal involving the Cambridge Analytica political consulting firm.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Backup Software vs. Backup as a Service (BaaS): The Key Differences
item.description: As data volumes increase exponentially, the threat of data loss from cyberattacks, human error, or system failure has never been greater — which is why, in 2025, fortifying a data protection strategy has never made more sense.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How to protect your deliveries from getting stolen by porch pirates
item.description: Porch pirates are on the prowl this holiday season. Tech guru Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson has a number of tips to prevent holiday package thefts.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: AI agents are coming to work — here’s what businesses need to know
item.description: AI agents will soon be everywhere, automating complex business processes and taking care of mundane tasks for workers — at least that’s the claim of various software vendors that are quickly adding intelligent bots to a wide range of work apps. Many companies appear to be listening.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Nvidia is Wall Street's most valuable company. How it got there, by the numbers
item.description: Nvidia has once again turned out quarterly results that exceeded Wall Street's forecasts. The company has seen soaring demand for its semiconductors, which are used to power artificial intelligence applications.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: US gathers allies to talk AI safety as Trump's vow to undo Biden's AI policy overshadows their work
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump has vowed to repeal President Joe Biden's signature artificial intelligence policy when he returns to the White House for a second term. What that actually means for the future of AI technology remains to be seen.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: DoD, Hill eye CMMC tax credit for smaller defense contractors
item.description: The CMMC tax credit would be available to companies with 50 or fewer employees. The bill could feature in negotiations over tax cuts next year. The post DoD, Hill eye CMMC tax credit for smaller defense contractors first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Kotlin for Java developers: Classes and coroutines
item.description: Java is one of the classic object-oriented languages, so classes and objects are of special interest to Java developers. Object-oriented programming gives you considerable power, particularly when it comes to structuring and organizing programs as they grow larger.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Microsoft unveils imaging APIs for Windows Copilot Runtime
item.description: Microsoft’s Windows Copilot Runtime, which allows developers to integrate AI capabilities into Windows, is being fitted with AI-backed APIs for image processing. It will also gain access to Phi 3.5 Silica, a custom-built generative AI model for Copilot+ PCs.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Forget driverless cars. One company wants autonomous helicopters to spray crops and fight fires
item.description: HENNIKER, N.H. (AP) — When Hector Xu was learning to fly a helicopter in college, he recalled having a few “nasty experiences” while trying to navigate at night.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL CASEY, Associated Press, NewsNation
